CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2017 Continued To Aug-16-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark B. Chernev (415-956-8100) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Hong Zheng.
No other appearances.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LUN XU, ZHENG XU DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. All causes of action are sufficiently alleged; and, as alleged, are not barred by the statute of limitations. Additionally, Plaintiff is allowed to plead in the alternative. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS LUN XU and ZHENG XU's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is taken off calendar. A first amended complaint was filed April 24, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =(302/HK)

Defendant'S Lun Ji Xu And Zheng Zhi Xu'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar May-09-2017 Text Ruling

DefendantS Lun Ji Xu And Zheng Zhi Xu'S Demurrer To Complaint is OFF CALENDAR - First Amended Complaint on file. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
